bulkImport.title: Bulk Importing
bulkImport.description: Bulk import up to 50 TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube Shorts links at once to quickly download transcripts in bulk. Save time and manage large volumes of videos efficiently, all in one place.

bulkImport.feature2: TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts support

collection.title: TikTok Collection & Playlist Importing
collection.description: Users can paste a single link to a public TikTok collection (bookmarks) or a creator's playlist to automatically import and transcribe all videos contained within it. Playlists often represent a creator's mini-series based on a specific subject, topic, or series.
collection.imageAlt: Collection import interface showing TikTok profile videos being bulk downloaded

cloudStorage.title: Cloud Storage
cloudStorage.description: Store all your video transcripts securely in the cloud with enterprise-grade encryption. Instantly sync and access your files across every device. Anytime, anywhere, with automatic cloud backup and unmatched reliability.
cloudStorage.imageAlt: Cloud transcript library with saved transcripts organized by date

history.title: History & Bookmarking
history.description: Access a complete transcript history for every video you process—automatically logging download dates, transcript details, video sources, and durations. Instantly re-download transcripts in TXT, XML, or PDF formats, and organize your entire video library with custom bookmark folders. Effortlessly share, bulk export, or review transcripts, collections, and playlists for ultimate video transcript organization and workflow management.
history.feature3: Re-download in TXT, XML, PDF formats
history.imageAlt: Transcript history panel showing previously processed videos

mediaDownload.title: HD Video & Cover Image Downloads
mediaDownload.description: Download TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts videos in HD quality with no watermarks. Instantly save high-resolution cover images and preserve original video quality across all supported platforms.
mediaDownload.imageAlt: Media download interface with video and cover image save options

quickUrl.title: Quick URL Download
quickUrl.description: Instant video transcripts just add 'tokscript.com/' in front of any video URL. Instantly redirect and download transcripts without logging in or visiting the main website—fast, automatic, and works with every platform.
quickUrl.feature2: No need to visit main website
quickUrl.imageAlt: Quick URL method showing paste-and-process transcript extraction

chromeExtension.title: Chrome Extension
chromeExtension.description: Use our Chrome extension to instantly copy video transcripts to your clipboard or download them as .txt files while watching TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts—no need to copy the URL. Works on both web and mobile browsers for ultimate convenience.
chromeExtension.feature3: Works on web and mobile browsers

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Your questions, answered.
faq.bottomText: Have more questions? Click here to visit our support docs.

q1.title: What is TokScript?
q1.answer: TokScript is an AI-powered platform that allows users to generate transcripts for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts videos. It offers features like bulk importing, cloud storage, team collaboration, and AI agents to enhance content creation and management.

q2.title: Who can use TokScript?
q2.answer: TokScript is designed for content creators, social media managers, marketing teams, agencies, and businesses who want to streamline their video content creation process. Whether you're a solo creator or part of a large team, our platform scales to meet your needs.

q3.title: How does TokScript work?
q3.answer: Simply upload your video links or import them in bulk, and our AI analyzes the content to generate engaging scripts. You can then customize, save to your cloud library, and share with your team. Our AI agents can also help optimize scripts for better engagement and virality.

q4.title: Can I customize the scripts?
q4.answer: Absolutely! All generated scripts are fully customizable. You can edit, rewrite, add your own style, and save multiple versions. Our platform also offers AI-powered suggestions to help you optimize your scripts for maximum engagement.

q5.title: Does TokScript only work for TikTok?
q5.answer: No, TokScript works across multiple platforms including TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Our AI is trained to understand the unique requirements and audience preferences of each platform to generate optimized content.

q6.title: Are the scripts original?
q6.answer: Yes, all scripts generated by TokScript are original content created by our AI based on your input videos. We ensure that each script is unique and tailored to your specific content, helping you maintain authenticity while saving time on content creation.

q7.title: How long does it take to download a transcript?
q7.answer: The download time for videos transcripts depends on various factors: internet speed, the length of the transcript, and the size or length of the video files. Generally, it should take about 5-10 seconds to get download the video transcript. If the video is longer (5 minutes) it can take around 30 seconds until it's complete. Please note that these are approximate times and may vary based on the specific circumstances mentioned above.

q8.title: How do I download TikTok Video Transcript?
q8.answer: We make it easy to download your TikTok Video Transcript instantly and with as little effort as possible. To download your TikTok video Transcript all you need is the link to the video you wish to get the transcript from. Go to the TikTok video you wish to download, Copy the link to the video, and paste it into the input field up above. This will allow you to download the TikTok video transcript instantly! You can grab this link by going to the "share" icon, and clicking "Copy Link". Now just paste it on our site and that's it!

q9.title: How do I download Instagram Reels Video Transcript?
q9.answer: In order to download your Instagram Reels video Transcript all you need is the link to the video. Go to the Instagram Reels video you wish to download, Copy the link to the video, and paste it into the input field on our website. This will allow you to download the Instagram Reels video transcript instantly! You can grab this link by going to the "share" icon, and clicking "Copy Link". Now just paste it on our site and that's it!

q10.title: How do I download Youtube Shorts video transcript?
q10.answer: It's simple! All you need to do is go to the Youtube Shorts video you wish to download, Copy the link to the video, and paste it into the input field on our website. This will allow you to download the Youtube Shorts video transcript instantly! You can grab this link by going to the "share" icon, and clicking "Copy Link". Now just paste it on our site and that's it!

q11.title: It says there's no transcripts to download, how come?
q11.answer: If you get this error it means that the video you tried to get a transcription from doesn't exist. This has nothing to do with our website and more so to do with the specific video you're attempting to download. Double-check and make sure that something is being said in the video in order for us to extract those words and download them for you!

q12.title: Will it download ANY transcript from ANY video?
q12.answer: We can download ANY transcript from ANY video for TikTok, Youtube Shorts, and IG Reels so long as there's a transcript available to download. If your video has no "talking" in it, or the creator has disabled the auto-transcribe within the platform itself we will not be able to download them. Don't worry, most videos have video transcripts enabled and this only happens on rare occasions.

q13.title: Do I need to have a TikTok, Youtube, or Instagram account to download transcripts?
q13.answer: Absolutely not! You don't need a TikTok, Instagram, or Youtube account to download your video transcripts. All you require is the link to the video you want to download the transcript from. Simply paste your link into the input field at the top of this page and hit "Start." and we will handle the rest!

q14.title: Do I need to be logged into a TikTok, Youtube, or Instagram to download Transcripts?
q14.answer: No. You do not need to be logged into TikTok, Instagram, or Youtube when downloading the transcripts. Making it fast and easy for you to use regardless where you're at or if you're logged in.

q15.title: Do I need to install extensions to use the downloader?
q15.answer: No. To save your video transcripts all you need to do is add the link to your TikTok, Youtube Shorts, or Instagram Reels video. Just paste it into the input field above and download your video transcript!

q16.title: How do I get the link to download TikTok, Instagram Reels, or Youtube Shorts transcripts?
q16.answer: To download Youtube Shorts, TikTok Videos, and IG Reels is simple! All you need is the link to the video (available on both desktop and mobile). Copy paste it into our site and we'll take care of the rest! It's that simple to download any video transcript with ease!

q17.title: Do I have to pay to download transcripts?
q17.answer: This website is 100% free for you to use. We do have a paid subscription that gives you over 10 different features that a free account does not have! If you like this tool we suggest checking out our other tools and extensions for even faster social media growth and management. We support and are compatible with all browsers such as Google Chrome, Arc, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Safari, and more!

q18.title: Is it free?
q18.answer: Yes! TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts offer free video transcripts. These transcripts are created using automated speech recognition technology, so they might not be entirely accurate but are generally suitable for most purposes.
